# `Decrunch`

**Systems:** C64, MEGA65, PLUS4, C128, VIC20, PET, ATARI2600, APPLEII, SNES, ORIC, BBCM, ACORN, ATARI800  
**Parameters:** `a`

***

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>Decrunch( [address] );</h3>
<ul>
    <li>[address] - address of crunched data</li>
</ul>


<h3>Description</h3>
<p>Decrunches crunched data from the specific address. Destination address is specified in crunch.</p>


<h3>Example</h3>

<code>
var
        my_crunched_data: IncBin("crunched/data_c.bin", $9000);

begin
        decrunch(my_crunched_data); // will be decrunched to the address specified in the crunched file

        ...
</code>


</div>
